catering_options.name: Vegetarian Buffet Lunch
catering_options.description: Seasonal vegetarian buffet with salads, hot mains, desserts, and non-alcoholic beverages.

catering_options.name: Classic Mixed Buffet Lunch
catering_options.description: Mixed hot and cold buffet with meat, fish, and vegetarian options, including desserts and soft drinks.

catering_options.name: Wedding Seated Dinner
catering_options.description: Three-course plated dinner with a choice of meat, fish, and vegetarian main courses, coffee and tea service.

catering_options.name: Premium Coffee Break
catering_options.description: Barista coffee, teas, juices, pastries, fruit, and snacks for morning or afternoon breaks.

catering_options.name: Vegan Gala Dinner
catering_options.description: Upscale three-course vegan seated dinner with locally sourced ingredients and plant-based desserts.

chalets.name: Lakeside Family Chalet
chalets.description: Spacious two-bedroom chalet directly overlooking the lake, ideal for families with children. Includes a kitchenette and complimentary breakfast at the main lodge.
chalets.policiesText: Non-smoking chalet. Quiet hours from 22:00 to 07:00. Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival; 50% charge within 7 days.
chalets.locationDescription: Directly on the west shore of the main lake, a 3-minute walk from the central lodge.

chalets.name: Garden Family Suite Chalet
chalets.description: Bright family chalet set among landscaped gardens, with separate kids’ sleeping nook and a fully equipped kitchenette.
chalets.policiesText: Non-smoking. Children of all ages welcome. Free cancellation up to 5 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Nestled in a quiet garden courtyard, close to the playground and pool.

chalets.name: Forest Loft Family Chalet
chalets.description: Cozy loft-style chalet with forest views, a mezzanine sleeping area for kids, and a compact kitchenette. Breakfast is included at the main restaurant.
chalets.policiesText: Pets allowed on request (fee applies). Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: On the edge of the pine forest trail loop, about a 5-minute walk from the reception.

chalets.name: Lakeview Retreat Chalet
chalets.description: Elegant one-bedroom chalet with panoramic lake views, private deck, and fireplace. Perfect for couples seeking a quiet escape.
chalets.policiesText: Adults-only chalet. Free cancellation up to 14 days before arrival; 100% charge within 3 days.
chalets.locationDescription: Cliffside row above the lake promenade, with direct stair access to the water.

chalets.name: Lakeview Hideaway Chalet
chalets.description: Intimate chalet with floor-to-ceiling windows and a wraparound deck facing the lake. Includes kitchenette and indoor soaking tub.
chalets.policiesText: Adults-only. Non-refundable discounted rates available; flexible rates cancellable up to 7 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Upper ridge above the lake with unobstructed sunrise views.

chalets.name: Lakeview Terrace Chalet
chalets.description: Modern chalet with a large furnished terrace overlooking the lake, ideal for couples or solo travelers.
chalets.policiesText: Adults-only. Free cancellation up to 10 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Terraced hillside row with partial lake and forest views, close to the spa.

chalets.name: Economy Forest Cabin
chalets.description: Compact, budget-friendly cabin tucked into the forest. Simple comforts with easy access to hiking trails.
chalets.policiesText: No daily housekeeping included in base rate. Free cancellation up to 3 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Deep in the northern forest cluster, a 10-minute walk from the main lodge.

chalets.name: Mountain View Studio Chalet
chalets.description: Open-plan studio chalet with floor-to-ceiling windows looking onto the surrounding mountains.
chalets.policiesText: Non-smoking. Free cancellation up to 5 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Upper slope tier with sweeping mountain vistas and easy access to the spa tram.

chalets.name: Alpine Spa Chalet with Private Hot Tub
chalets.description: Luxury alpine chalet featuring a private outdoor hot tub on the deck, sauna-style bathroom, and plush king bed.
chalets.policiesText: Adults-only spa chalet. Free cancellation up to 14 days before arrival; full charge within 7 days.
chalets.locationDescription: Secluded spa terrace on the south ridge, with direct access to the wellness center.

chalets.name: Forest Spa Chalet with Hot Tub
chalets.description: Romantic chalet surrounded by trees, featuring a private outdoor hot tub and hammock on the deck.
chalets.policiesText: Adults-only. Non-refundable bookings available with additional discount.
chalets.locationDescription: Hidden among mature pines on the eastern slope, a short shuttle ride from reception.

chalets.name: Garden Bungalow Chalet
chalets.description: Single-level bungalow opening onto shared gardens, suitable for up to three guests.
chalets.policiesText: Children welcome. Free cancellation up to 5 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Central garden ring, steps from the main lodge and restaurant.

chalets.name: Lakeview Grand Lodge
chalets.description: Expansive multi-bedroom lodge with large living area, fireplace, and full kitchen, suitable for groups and extended families.
chalets.policiesText: Security deposit required on arrival. Free cancellation up to 21 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Prime position on the lakefront ridge with private path down to the water.

chalets.name: Riverside Hot Tub Cabin
chalets.description: Rustic-chic cabin along the riverbank with private outdoor hot tub and firepit.
chalets.policiesText: Outdoor hot tub may be unavailable during severe weather. Free cancellation up to 10 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: Along the bend of the river, a 7-minute walk from the central lodge via the riverside path.

chalets.name: Hillside Studio Chalet
chalets.description: Simple hillside studio with balcony and partial valley views, ideal for solo travelers or couples on a budget.
chalets.policiesText: Payment in full required at booking for discounted rates. Flexible rate cancellable up to 2 days before arrival.
chalets.locationDescription: On the lower hillside tier, a short walk from parking and shuttle stop.

conference_rooms.name: Oak Conference Hall
conference_rooms.description: Versatile main conference hall suitable for plenary sessions, seminars, and corporate events, with natural light and lake glimpses.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Theater (up to 80), classroom (up to 60), cabaret (up to 56), U-shape (up to 34).

conference_rooms.name: Grand Lake Hall
conference_rooms.description: Flagship ballroom-style hall with full-stage capabilities and direct access to a lakeside terrace.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Theater (up to 200), banquet (up to 150), classroom (up to 120).

conference_rooms.name: Cedar Conference Room
conference_rooms.description: Medium-sized conference room ideal for workshops and training sessions, with integrated AV and flexible layouts.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Theater (up to 60), classroom (up to 40), U-shape (up to 26), boardroom (up to 24).

conference_rooms.name: Pine Boardroom
conference_rooms.description: Executive-style boardroom with fixed table, ergonomic chairs, and video conferencing facilities.

conference_rooms.name: Spruce Breakout Room A
conference_rooms.description: Flexible breakout room with movable furniture, ideal for group work and parallel sessions.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Classroom (up to 24), cabaret (up to 24), U-shape (up to 18), circle (up to 24).

conference_rooms.name: Spruce Breakout Room B
conference_rooms.description: Bright breakout room with forest views, suited for small team sessions and breakouts.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Classroom (up to 22), cabaret (up to 20), U-shape (up to 16), circle (up to 22).

conference_rooms.name: Maple Meeting Room
conference_rooms.description: Comfortable meeting space with natural daylight, ideal for mid-sized groups and brainstorming sessions.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Theater (up to 40), classroom (up to 28), U-shape (up to 20), boardroom (up to 18).

conference_rooms.name: Willow Lakeside Pavilion
conference_rooms.description: Open-sided pavilion by the lake, perfect for informal gatherings, receptions, and outdoor sessions.
conference_rooms.layoutOptions: Reception (up to 70), theater (up to 60), banquet (up to 56).

packages.name: Romantic Lakeside Weekend
packages.description: Two-night romantic escape including a lake-view chalet, daily breakfast, welcome sparkling wine, and late checkout.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Daily breakfast for 2, one three-course romantic dinner on Saturday night.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Private shoreline picnic setup, complimentary canoe rental for 2 hours.

packages.name: Starlight Escape for Two
packages.description: Premium romantic package with a hot-tub chalet, champagne on arrival, and extra-late checkout on Sunday.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Breakfast in bed for 2 each morning, one five-course chef’s tasting dinner.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Guided stargazing session, access to spa circuit, and late-night s’mores kit.

packages.name: Family Adventure Weekend
packages.description: Fun-filled weekend for families including a family chalet, breakfast, and guided outdoor activities.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Daily breakfast for the family, one casual BBQ dinner.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Guided forest walk, kids’ craft workshop, and lakeside campfire with hot chocolate.

packages.name: Midweek Conference Bundle
packages.description: Special midweek rate for corporate groups including a main hall, two breakout rooms, and buffet lunch.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Buffet lunch and two coffee breaks per full day.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Use of conference AV equipment and one team-building activity per stay.

packages.name: Winter Lake Retreat
packages.description: Cozy winter escape with discounted chalet rates, hot drinks, and optional spa add-ons.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Daily breakfast and welcome mulled cider.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Guided snowshoe walk or winter hike (weather permitting).

packages.name: Lakeside Wedding Celebration
packages.description: Comprehensive wedding package including ceremony setup, reception in the Grand Lake Hall, and seated dinner.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Seated three-course wedding dinner, cocktail reception canapés, and midnight snack.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Use of bridal preparation suite, basic floral centerpieces, and DJ booth setup.

packages.name: European Romantic Getaway
packages.description: Romantic package priced in EUR including a hot-tub chalet, breakfast, and prosecco on arrival.
packages.includedMealsDescription: Daily breakfast for 2, one candlelit dinner.
packages.includedActivitiesDescription: Access to thermal spa circuit and late evening sauna session.

promo_codes.description: 20% off midweek chalet stays of 3 nights or more during the winter season.
15% off selected romantic lake-view packages for couples.
$50 off full-day conference room bookings with catering added.
